## Description

## Steps to Reproduce

3. See error

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment

- Expo SDK: [e.g. 54]
- Device: [e.g. iPhone 16, Pixel 9]
- Theme: [e.g. Blue, Dark mode]
